HGSS.371.0000:
...Hnuurg ...Huh?\f
I walked too far today looking
for Pokémon.\f
My feet hurt and I’m sleepy...\f
If I were a wild Pokémon, I’d be
easy to catch...\f
...Zzzz...
HGSS.371.0001:
...Hnuurg! ...Huh?\f
I feel like reading some words
on a piece of paper or something...\f
...Zzz...
...!!\f
HGSS.371.0002:
Huh? What?
What about that Pokémon?\r
I don’t have any mail.\f
Zzz...
HGSS.371.0004:
Oh, hey! I got an email!\f
...
Huh?\r
I don’t know this Pokémon.\r
I’ll just let you take care of it.\f
HGSS.371.0005:
[0103,0000,0000] handed over the Pokémon
holding the Mail.
HGSS.371.0007:
Let’s see...\f
“Thank you for your Mail.
It was such an exciting adventure.\f
I did not like ZUBAT, though...”
That’s what it says.\f
I went to a dark cave the other day
with a friend.\f
That cave leads to another route.
By the way, I must thank you for\r
being so kind.\f
I’d like to do something good in return.\f
HGSS.371.0008:
TM44 is...
...Zzz...\r
...\f
...Umm... Rest!\f
The phrase “recover fast” became
shortened to “Rest,” you see?\r
This is a move to sleep and recover HP.
HGSS.371.0010:
...Wait!
That would make you not have\r
any Pokémon!
HGSS.371.0011:
I found a good Pokémon in Dark Cave.
I’m going to raise it to take on\r
Falkner.\f
He’s the leader of Violet City’s Gym.
HGSS.371.0012:
Dark Cave...\f
If a Pokémon could light it up,
I’d explore it.
HGSS.371.0015:
Huh? What is it?
Is that a Pokémon Egg?\r
I’ve never seen one.\f
...Zzz...
